notes: Operational roadmap for Post-Entry duty-rate sources. Source status controls product trust wording: auto_updatable means a maintained script can refresh official machine-readable rates; benchmark_updatable means a maintained script can refresh local benchmark metadata but the rate remains indicative; official_link means an official source is identified but not machine-refreshed yet; benchmark means local pre-check math only.

sources.name: United States HTS / USITC
sources.status_reason: USITC exposes a stable machine-readable HTS export endpoint for maintained HS prefixes.
sources.current_scope: General HTS base duty for maintained HS prefixes. Additional duties such as Section 301 and AD/CVD remain separate benchmark/scope checks.
sources.next_action: Keep USITC sync running before releases and monitor changes in data/duty-rates.json.

sources.name: EU TARIC
sources.authority: European Commission Taxation and Customs Union
sources.status_reason: EU TARIC consultation and CIRCABC full database are reachable; this updater can locate the latest import duties workbook and select official candidate rates only when ERGA OMNES third-country duty rows produce one unambiguous rate.
sources.current_scope: Maintained EU common customs duty benchmark for covered electronics/new-energy prefixes. Member-state VAT remains separate.
sources.next_action: Run the TARIC workbook dry-run command against Duties Import 01-99.xlsx; official candidate rates will auto-apply only when each maintained prefix has one unambiguous ERGA OMNES third-country-duty rate.

sources.name: Germany import VAT with EU TARIC duty
sources.authority: European Commission TARIC / German tax authority
sources.status_reason: Germany uses EU TARIC for customs duty; local VAT remains a separate benchmark layer.
sources.current_scope: Uses EU common customs duty benchmark plus Germany VAT benchmark.
sources.next_action: Use EU benchmark updater now; upgrade to TARIC parser together with EU source.

sources.name: Netherlands import VAT with EU TARIC duty
sources.authority: European Commission TARIC / Dutch tax authority
sources.status_reason: Netherlands uses EU TARIC for customs duty; local VAT remains a separate benchmark layer.
sources.current_scope: Uses EU common customs duty benchmark plus Netherlands VAT benchmark.
sources.next_action: Use EU benchmark updater now; upgrade to TARIC parser together with EU source.

sources.name: Singapore Customs duties and GST
sources.status_reason: Singapore import duty treatment for covered electronics is maintained as duty-free benchmark plus GST; official source is not parsed as machine tariff data yet.
sources.current_scope: Maintained Singapore duty-free electronics benchmark plus 9% GST value treatment reminder.
sources.next_action: Research official tariff/GST machine source; keep GST benchmark explicit until then.

sources.name: Mexico tariff / VAT
sources.status_reason: Official source identified. Local benchmark metadata can refresh automatically while exact TIGIE extraction remains pending.
sources.current_scope: Benchmark VAT plus TIGIE tariff-line review reminder.
sources.next_action: Keep benchmark updater running; research machine-readable TIGIE source before official automatic rates.

sources.name: Japan Customs tariff
sources.status_reason: Official Japan Customs source is identified; local benchmark updater refreshes consumption-tax and duty-free electronics assumptions until machine tariff parsing is wired.
sources.current_scope: Benchmark duty plus consumption tax reminder.
sources.next_action: Keep benchmark updater running; research downloadable Japan tariff schedule format before official automatic rates.

sources.name: Korea Customs tariff / VAT
sources.status_reason: Official Korea Customs source is identified; local benchmark updater refreshes VAT and common electronics assumptions until UNI-PASS tariff parsing is wired.
sources.next_action: Keep benchmark updater running; research UNI-PASS or public tariff data access before official automatic rates.

sources.name: China import tariff / VAT
sources.authority: General Administration of Customs / Ministry of Finance
sources.status_reason: Local benchmark exists, but official China tariff lookup is not connected to an updater yet.
sources.current_scope: Local benchmark for electronics import duty and VAT.
sources.next_action: Map official China tariff lookup or maintained local tariff table.

sources.name: Vietnam Customs tariff / VAT
sources.status_reason: Official customs source identified, but preferential tariff and VAT data are not wired yet.
sources.current_scope: Benchmark VAT/duty status for electronics; preferential tariffs depend on origin and entry date.

sources.name: Malaysia Customs SST / duty
sources.status_reason: Official customs/SST source identified, but tariff and exemption data are not wired yet.
sources.next_action: Research tariff/SST list machine readability and exemptions.

sources.name: Taiwan Customs tariff / business tax
sources.status_reason: Official customs source identified; lower current priority than US/EU/SG/MX/JP/KR/VN/MY.
sources.current_scope: Benchmark business tax and tariff-line reminder.
sources.next_action: Research customs tariff lookup data export options.

sources.name: Russia / EAEU tariff and VAT
sources.status_reason: Official source identified, but sanctions scope must stay separate from ordinary duty math.
sources.current_scope: Benchmark EAEU duty/VAT plus sanctions and restricted-party scope warning.
sources.next_action: Keep sanctions scope flag separate from ordinary duty math.
